author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Write a channel-aware memory note for the rebooted BDC line that specifies addressability, retrieval, accessibility states, and noise-aware assumptions.
research_question: Can BDC translate DNA-inspired memory from metaphor into a bounded architectural note that explicitly depends on addressability and the previously defined error/erasure model?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the error/erasure model is written.

tests_required: note explicitly references the error/erasure model dependency
